payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's a different place entirely. You guys all bundled up into a singular room above the floor of the Feed and Mead. Found yourselves exhausted, passed out, and got an evening's rest, so you've all gotten a long rest. You've healed up. You've recovered your abilities. As the uncomfortable warmth of the morning kicks in, with your small room and number of warm bodies encompassing a very tight and not very drafty space, the partially humid early hours draw you from consciousness. You all begin to stretch your sore muscles and decide what endeavors await you with the new day. What do you guys want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: The Broad Barn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's why I wrote Broad Barn down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is why.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I wrote "Rod Barn."

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "All right. It'll be about an hour. Because it's just me."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's a very long barn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a very big barn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What if it's a street? We didn't clarify, did we?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What if it's a tavern? I don't know, I got confused in his delivery.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I bet we can ask the guy downstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He seemed nice last night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We go downstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll follow for this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a Zork game. We go down the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know, apparently. You head downstairs to the only other real location within the Feed and Mead Tavern. There's Crute still there off to the side and one very dirty and ashy civilian who is currently slowly scarfing a meal with a thousand yard stare. Looks like they had been close to the action and chaos the evening before. As you walk down, Crute looks across and goes, "I see you're awake. Would you like breakfast?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, please.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The two of you jump in with Crute in what is a not very well-kept kitchen, but functional. The gristle, who knows how long it's been there. It might add to the flavor, who knows.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I bet we can ask the guy downstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He seemed nice last night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We go downstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll follow for this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a Zork game. We go down the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know, apparently. You head downstairs to the only other real location within the Feed and Mead Tavern. There's Crute still there off to the side and one very dirty and ashy civilian who is currently slowly scarfing a meal with a thousand yard stare. Looks like they had been close to the action and chaos the evening before. As you walk down, Crute looks across and goes, "I see you're awake. Would you like breakfast?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right. It'll be about an hour. Because it's just me."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: An hour? All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's just me."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want some help? I'll come help you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Come on!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll go in for this if it means a faster breakfast.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "You don't have to! Okay, okay." As you dive in, you spend the next ten minutes helping move through some of the heavier beams that collapsed. There is still somewhat of a structure, mainly of the bottom floor, but a lot of the top floor, the one that you were in last night, has fallen in over time. So it's moving some of the bigger beams out of the way. As you're pulling through and moving some of the larger pieces of the structure, the halfling man goes, "I appreciate the help. Name's Thadeus. Thadeus Candleglow."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should we go over and talk to him?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we recognize this person?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have not met this person, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're a halfling, too, so maybe you should talk to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm not technically.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to walk over.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll join. We'll just go over and scare the shit out of him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Need a hand?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see a halfling man, maybe in his fifth decade or so. He has ashy blond hair and a face cracked by smiling, though now too dour and soot-covered to see any sort of smile on his face. As he pulls through some of the rubble and he's making a small pile on the side, he looks up and goes, "Oh, right. Can I help you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We were part of this commotion last night. We were wondering if you need a hand with anything right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I mean, if you don't--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm taking off my jacket.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "20 years since I was left this place. Built by my grandpaps, Reedus."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We were part of this commotion last night. We were wondering if you need a hand with anything right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I mean, if you don't--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm taking off my jacket.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You don't have to! Okay, okay." As you dive in, you spend the next ten minutes helping move through some of the heavier beams that collapsed. There is still somewhat of a structure, mainly of the bottom floor, but a lot of the top floor, the one that you were in last night, has fallen in over time. So it's moving some of the bigger beams out of the way. As you're pulling through and moving some of the larger pieces of the structure, the halfling man goes, "I appreciate the help. Name's Thadeus. Thadeus Candleglow."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, this was your place?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It was."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, wow.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, if at some point the gracious gods see fit to bequeath upon me a strike of good luck and I can get to rebuilding, my friend, one day, you may be able to try one of my meats."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is yours the only business that was hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I haven't looked around, to be perfectly honest. I've been a little focused on--" and he gestures out with his hands at the rubble that was once his life.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You had a lot of meat, didn't you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, you have to present meat. A lot of people around here eat meat."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Would you say that you offer a larger selection of meat than some of the other establishments in town?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you're asking me, then the best meat. Don't know about quantity, but quality was--" (tongue click)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I've been robbed of the experience of your fine, fine meat products, and I, for one, would like you to rebuild so that I might try some of your meats.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "At one time it was a barn, but the farm stopped giving up crop, and so they converted the barn itself into what was a general store, because they started selling off the tools they didn't need, but that made them more money than the crops did that year, so we started importing more tools, and for the past 30 years the Broad Barn has been our commonly known general supply place there on the western side of Alfield, so if you want to--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, Mollymauk, another question for you: Is there maybe-- I hope it is still standing-- but a supply store?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah, if you're looking for farming supplies, general supplies, there's--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, I'm in the need of some incense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, you could probably find something like that there, The Broad Barn."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! It's a store!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Question answered. I'm sorry, I'm standing by Fjord. Question answered!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's like half a question, because you're wondering why it's called that at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I bet it's big.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: At least wide.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I'm deeply sorry about that. Starosta Kosh is high-strung on a holiday, and tensions have never been this high since he was assigned here eight years ago, so please don't take that to heart. He's just a--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I turn to Jester, and I go, look inviting. Look heroic.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "No. Those in higher political positions rarely do, it seems. Anyway, I want to thank you all again for your aid last night. I can't fathom the further death toll, had you not been there and jumped in selflessly as you did. Thank you." Bryce trails off and looks back towards where Starosta Kosh had stormed off and goes, "Fucking Dwendalian political bullshit. We've needed a more trained guard here for weeks, especially with Xhorhas bleeding into the valley, but we're far too south to matter. Any request has been declined due to all necessary forces being needed at the garrisons by Brokenveil. If they were doing their jobs at the Bluffs, we wouldn't have so many reports of violent beasts in the valley in the first place, but here we are. At least I've gotten approval for a bit more cash. To that, while I do not know what your business here is in Alfield, if you are still interested, we are in need of some skilled mercenary work."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I turn to Jester, and I go, look inviting. Look heroic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm deeply sorry about that. Starosta Kosh is high-strung on a holiday, and tensions have never been this high since he was assigned here eight years ago, so please don't take that to heart. He's just a--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Dick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Your words, not mine."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Seems some people handle pressure better than others. He doesn't seem like the handling type.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, until at least this threat has been dealt with in a satisfactory way. I've unfortunately not had my scouts return after they were sent the night before, which does not bode well, but I suspect that we should see some sort of hopeful backup sent by Zadash or Bladegarden within the next week or two. In the meantime, we're a bit of a sitting duck scenario, so I've sent a few guards to go to Zadash to see what other mercenaries could be sent forward. We do have some folks traveling along the road and will keep an eye out to see if anybody else is looking for some coin, but for now, you are our first line of defense. Or offense, if you will."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to kill all of them!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We couldn't help but overhear that you were asking for some aid. How long were you thinking you might need these replacements?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The robe coloring is what caught you, and the hair. The specific slicked and parted comb. You have seen this individual before. You were younger. Maybe eight or so years ago. Eight or nine years.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes? Are you all right?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, a lot on my mind. Speaking of the aurochs, I asked you yesterday if you'd heard if any of the farmers had had their cattle hit? You heard that yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I could ask around. It does happen on occasion."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's fine. We'll ask on our way out. It's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey, Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you'll excuse me, I do have something to get to. But good luck and godspeed."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Have fun dealing with the dick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'll do my best." Bryce turns around and leaves.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did I recognize Starosta Kosh? Did he seem like the type that would have made a little side trip down to-- because he seems like the type.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Was that a character-DM inside joke?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know; I feel like I learned something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an intelligence check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm filing, I'm putting a wall between that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can't read your dice at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Intelligence, 18.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Within ten minutes of wandering through the city as you guys have gathered yourselves and begun heading towards the eastern side, you see a crownsguard who is currently walking by with some washrags under one arm and a little streak of dried blood down the side of their face. Looks to be a young man probably in his mid-20s or so. Longish hair that's been heavily braided on the sides and then pinned to the back in a tuft of a ponytail.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You need a tart?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I need a tart.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, well, why didn't you say something? Hold on, let me dig.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a bag of pastries!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There's this one--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hold on. I think there's a blackberry one somewhere in here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, I can't tell what this used to be.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's kind of gross; I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that the top or the bottom?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can't tell anymore. It's all black. Sorry!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have two tarts!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Very stale.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm taking them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't tell if the sour smell is intentional flavor or just time taking its toll. It'll be tart one way or the other.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we see any crownsguard around? In the street.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Over time you will. They're scattered a bit thin and a lot of them are currently focused on either perimeter watch, in case they come back, or helping out those that need help inside the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'd just like to find one, if I could.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: About five minutes pass and you can hear the clopping of hooves as Reggie comes back with a very obstinate beast on the reins. Dragging it towards you, slowly guiding it. Reggie doesn't seem to be a very trained individual when it comes to handling creatures, especially beasts of burden. "Will this do?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Look, I mean no offense whatsoever and if-- I can go find Bryce and see if we-- the Watchmaster would be much more suited to--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Your name?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Reggie."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Reggie. I'm disappointed, Reggie. I don't know what else to say. Let's go. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we go to the stables then?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck yeah. Now!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Reggie, this town has been hit hard, you look very weary and maybe a little down on your luck yourself. Maybe I'm just reading into things, but I would gladly pay you a silver for this horse.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let me tell you, Reggie, it would be the best deal you could possibly make. I'm going to use Charm Person.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Did not make that DC check. Reggie glances over at you. He goes, "Let me see what I can do," and quickly makes his way northward to the outside of the stables.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Very nice!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you!

payload.raw_text: Okay, easy enough to find. You placed it at a hitching post with a little bit of feed over the evening. Your cart and horse are safe and at your disposal.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: You said silver and we're being fair!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: "Just bring it back-- it's on loan! It's on loan."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: If we come back, it comes back.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Probably. We definitely won't use it as bait for the gnolls. Okay, bye!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: We make our way over to where we left our other horse and cart.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The grass can vary anywhere from knee-high to chest-high in places. The hills towards the top can get a little more rocky. There are patches where the grass doesn't grow as well and there's open dirt and broken shale. After about an hour or so of tracking in that direction, you come upon the Rillway Road, which is the main road that heads up towards Felderwin. You can see it a little ways off.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that is bad news. Are the carts all heading in the same direction or would they split up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They all converge into one path. They head through the relatively thin woods that surround the northeastern side of Alfield. As you progress on that path out to the other side of the woods, continue into the northeastern fields where the rolling hills begin, these hills seem to go on for miles.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin would be in the air 300-400 feet in front of the cart and I wouldn't do 100% of the time, but I would talk for three minutes and then maybe go: hold on one sec (magic sound effect) and then come back. So intermittent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Tall grass on these rolling hills?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or is it just open fucking hills?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Picked by beasts or--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, no. It's tall grass across the hills--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Seven.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this point now, you've been travelling, we'll say an hour and a half. It's getting close to noon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: In theory, am I actively tracking these creatures? The undead at least.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The undead tracks are falling in line with her tracking. They're moving as a group, but there are far less undead tracks than there are regular gnolls, so as best you can to keep tabs on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm curious how much of this Hunter's Bane I can actually be using right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You'd be leading if she hadn't made an equally good roll, so now both of you are leading this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The grass, is it dead or vibrant green?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Vibrant green, for the most part. The wind is picking up a little bit and you can see, especially when you start coming up over some of the bigger hills, you can see the waves cresting over the hillside and causing the shift of it. It's a very beautiful space.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it still the morning hour or about midday?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'll allow it. Go ahead and make a perception check, Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: One.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're having this conversation with Fjord, you're just not paying attention to the road in front of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: God.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If we're sitting in the cart, is the grass taller than us or is it way lower than us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it's about as tall as the cart at times, at times it's lower. You guys do stand out amongst the grass. As you head over the hills, or down below, you are above the grass line without an issue.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Walking on the ground as a human, is it up to here, or--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's about up to your chest at times. Waist to chest. It varies.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If I stand up in the cart as we go, can I see out into the grass?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, if you wanted.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What if I gave Jester a ride on my shoulders? While we walked.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: On a moving cart?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What could possibly go wrong?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've seen Teen Wolf, ja?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: In the cart, and I'm holding you. It'd be kind of cool!

payload.raw_text: For the next hour.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay. You are now officially intoxicated.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I don't have to roll, it just happens?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: For the next hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, but what if it alerts a lot of the gnolls, and then we don't have the element of surprise at all anymore?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, we're talking--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You want to go into that dark, scary cave?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't look that bad to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It is a dark, scary cave!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin is still just a sweet little bird, so I thought maybe a little quick flight in--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Canary in a gnoll mine! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Oh, smash!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We have to do it, it's too perfect.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Canary in a gnoll mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That was good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was so painful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do not be sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's limits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know if that's something Frumpkin can do, unless, Nott, you just wanna go in there and go kamikaze.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No! I'm drinking again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You are now officially intoxicated.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't have to roll, it just happens?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Great.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. The room fills with light at this point. The chamber fills, you can now see the scenery around you. Nott, you're up first. Since you're the first one to get a shot. There's one that's super hurt and one that's kind of hurt.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that is a 12. Sorry, my bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's the other character.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Old habits, they die hard. Nine points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine points of damage on that one. It gets blasted by the bolt of eldritch energy; however, it's still snarling. Currently they're both looking over at the sudden surge of newcomers.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I've also got a distance attack. I'm going to use Devil's Tongue on the one that just survived your hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, what does that do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use Vicious Mockery. In Infernal: You will feed the dogs in hell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, wow, I understood that. It was scary.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They rolled an eight, minus-- yeah, it does not make the save.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It takes 1d4 psychic, which is three points of psychic damage and has disadvantage on its next attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Got it, great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Four globules of light, Dancing Lights. The room is lit up.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. On the other side. As you're doing that, the gnoll that's right there sees you rushing off, but now it's more attentive to the one who blasted it there. I'd say, for the sake of distance, since the moment you saw you fired, it probably couldn't close the gap, so it's going to drop the spear, pull out its longbow, and take a shot at you from here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so go ahead and make your melee spell attack, I believe it is, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yep, that's a 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 19 hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I don't know how to do this. Hold on, is this a ten? No, that's a ten, this is an eight. Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seven it is. As you reach up and grab it with your hand, you watch as a burst of electrical arcane energy surges through its body. You watch as veins pop up its torso to its neck before it collapses into the ground. You have to duck out of the way before it slams. It would have crushed you if you'd stayed in the space you were, but you sidestep in time as the gnoll falls to the ground, lifeless.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I in range-- where's the other gnoll, is it right on me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I will bonus action disengage and run all the way around to the other side of the room.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We'll say since you two would be in the front then for that, you jumped up first. Perception check, both of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We were stealthing, we were stealthing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know. We're going to get to that in just a second.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: While a strange seventh figure places small wet stones upon this altar, smaller than the other gnolls. Let's get a perception check real fast from two of you. Who's leading the--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would have been bringing them down, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can see in the dark.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I can see in the dark, I'll look.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At a closer glance, you look and see. One of them currently is holding a pair of legs that are no longer attached to a torso, and is stripping the flesh from the thigh and leg, tearing into it. Takes a piece and chucks it off to the side, and the two hyenas fight over it. Another one back there, you can see, is clutching a scapula, the back of a shoulder blade, and is breaking the bones in half and sucking the marrow out. At a quick glance, you get the sense that some of these may have been denizens of Alfield as of 24 hours ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Are you going to try your thing or should I try my thing first?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What is your thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. I can try something! I can do a similar thing, have them see something behind them, but you can do the same thing. Yours are already cast, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Not right now, no. But it's like that (snaps), it's easy, this one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I could try to get one of them to fight with one of the other ones of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to sneak up, down the steps to that little crook in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Little further back, yeah. Is that all right? Do I have to roll or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit. Okay, with disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you still have the gift?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, you still have Blessing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so 26. That puts me within 30 feet of those guys, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And what are they doing? Eating hearts?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, then no damage. Okay, that ends your turn. Everyone else gets one action and then we roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I send Frumpkin through the chamber and down and starts battering into the walls here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As soon as Frumpkin begins doing that, you watch as the one that's nearest on this side, the one that had dropped the arm piece earlier, takes the bow off its back and begins to notch an arrow, looking around. It's going to take a shot at the bird fluttering through. That is a 17. What's Frumpkin's--?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'm sure that hits. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Six points of piercing damage. The bird goes (thud) on the ground and then dissipates. You watch as the four hyenas suddenly rush in towards where the bird had fallen, and they all go to the spot where it landed and find an arrow lying there, and (snarling and yipping).

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I cast Spiritual Weapon above the two gnolls directly in front of me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The range on that is--?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Range on that is 60 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're placing it where? Right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, right there. It's going to giant lollipop down and smack one of them in the face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Which one?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This one. The one on your left.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Go ahead and roll a spell attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, 19 plus whatever!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice. Roll damage on that, that definitely hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That is nine force damage, and that's my bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Damn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Then I can do a cantrip. For my action, I'm going to cast Sacred Flame at the same dude.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Same dude? That is a 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He saves, so is it half, or--?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What kind of a check was it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That would have been his dexterity saving throw, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. "Must succeed," so it probably doesn't do anything.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Good to know. Now, everyone please roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, but that technically did not initiate into a combat. It just bothered one of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mildly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A temporary inconvenience.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure, I'll send an arrow down into the one that Jester attacked.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's 23.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 23 hits. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine plus your sneak attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is a sneak attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because you were stealthed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Rogue, best class.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That one (explosion). The bolt goes through the center of his forehead and embeds itself right up to the very back. You watch as it (dying scream) and falls into the ground over one of the piled corpse pieces it was tearing through. Becoming one with its meal. And then?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Crouch back and hide.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, make a hide check to try and disappear back there. Stealth on that one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Advantage, but disadvantage, so 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You did your thing. Molly?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to creep out against the wall closest to me and try and hide in one of these coves. Over in the corner, as far as I can get into the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can get right into the similar space as Nott there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Does he see me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I would say barely.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hello!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hi.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Since I'm too far away for anything too crazy, I don't have a good bonus action. I will use my Devil's Tongue, I'll use Vicious Mockery on the gnoll that's currently in between-- not the one that's-- actually, the one that's furthest from us, because he's going to be the archer, and in Infernal I'm going to say: I'm too disgusted to think of anything clever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It rolled a natural one on its saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So yeah, that's three psychic damage and he has disadvantage on his next attack.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, that's your turn. All right, the gnolls are up first. These two here are going to pull out their bow and begin to fire at Beau. Since you had been the first to appear at this point and gather their attention. They both have disadvantage on the attacks. That is going to be an 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm at four.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They hyenas are before Nott. Then we have Nott, then we have Fjord. Molly, you're at the top of the round.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: God, that's awful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: God, that's bad. I don't think I even fucking spelled it right. I think I botched that all across the board. I spelled it "Hyneas."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Gets the idea across. The special hyena.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: "Hyneas!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What you got, Molly?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to get a little-- Oh, can I do this? No, I can't do that. Fuck. I know, I'm so sorry. I should have my shit together. How far (counting)? Oh god, that's too far to walk. I'm going to try and get one little crevice. Actually, I'm going to hold my position. I'm so sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hold your position?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Hold my position and use one more Tongue on one of the other guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Natural 20 on the saving throw, unfortunately.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (coughs) and I'm holding.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'll allow it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I was revealed. Okay. So I have to hide again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have to find a way to obscure something's vision to you before you can hide.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure, got it. Okay, I'll run up the stairs then and hide back near where Caleb is. Other side. And then hide.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That'll work. Go ahead and roll a stealth check as your bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I've cocked. Terrible. Nine plus eight is 17! Oh, wow, I'm so stealthy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're a rogue this go-round, man. All right, that ends Nott's turn. Fjord, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it is my turn! Can I use my bonus action to move my Hex from my defeated foe to my new foe right in front of me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You may.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and can I whip my falchion around and upstrike, just try and cut right through him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) I whip my falchion back and forth.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's only a 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 hits!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His AC's 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I say two-handed?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, you've got to say it. Two-handed, I'll allow it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure, got it. Okay, I'll run up the stairs then and hide back near where Caleb is. Other side. And then hide.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That'll work. Go ahead and roll a stealth check as your bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I've cocked. Terrible. Nine plus eight is 17! Oh, wow, I'm so stealthy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're a rogue this go-round, man. All right, that ends Nott's turn. Fjord, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it is my turn! Can I use my bonus action to move my Hex from my defeated foe to my new foe right in front of me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You may.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and can I whip my falchion around and upstrike, just try and cut right through him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) I whip my falchion back and forth.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's only a 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 hits!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His AC's 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I say two-handed?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll allow it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I've got to get in the habit of saying it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Now you have advantage on the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's almost something like a Jacob's Ladder moment, the end of his life is being stretched out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This gnoll is going to need some serious therapy. Nott, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can't believe this thing is still alive. It's still prone, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's prone, yeah, so melee attacks have advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So I walk up to it, and then point-blank shoot-- not point-blank, but far enough away that--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're at disadvantage with a ranged attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll stand back ten feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, you'll still get disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have disadvantage from a ranged attack up close and disadvantage against a prone creature. Right now, with your crossbow, it's disadvantage regardless.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, well shit. Then I will draw a sword and I will--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Slap that bitch!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Now you've got advantage.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The next ten to 15 minutes or so, you'll be able to shake off the alcohol.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Cheers.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He was like Beyoncé. He was one hot Knowles. (laughter and groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: One point of damage? All of us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everyone takes one point of psychic damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have a question. How similar do hyena ears look to gnoll ears?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They are noticeably smaller and not gnoll ears.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What if we said they were baby gnolls? I'm going to cut them off just to be safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Five sets of gnoll ears and four sets of hyena ears.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to call Nott over to the chest over on that side there. Do you see anything wrong with this? Is there anything hinky about that chest?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I check for traps. Checking for traps.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is an intelligence check?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are you still intoxicated?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's investigation, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Or has that shit worn off with some activity?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the adrenaline pumps through your system, it wakes you up a bit and even with the intoxication that's been flooding your system, you steal a moment of clarity and it opens without an issue. You glance at it, and the chest looks like it's been bashed in a little bit, like one of the gnolls was trying to get into it and eventually gave up, got flummoxed, and threw it on the ground. As you open it up from the inside, you can see essentially a central medical pack, if you will. An emergency pack for any of the miners that had gotten hurt or wounded. There are two healer's kits in there. There are a number of disinfectant herbs and funguses. Anybody who is proficient in medicine would know how best to utilize those. I don't know if any of you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to call Nott over to the chest over on that side there. Do you see anything wrong with this? Is there anything hinky about that chest?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I check for traps. Checking for traps.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is an intelligence check?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are you still intoxicated?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's investigation, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Or has that shit worn off with some activity?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The next ten to 15 minutes or so, you'll be able to shake off the alcohol.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: For now, I rolled an 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. It does not appear to be trapped.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's good!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Does it look good?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's totally good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Take a step back. You've earned this. I will open it, just in case.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (clunk) It's locked.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will pick it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Go ahead and attempt, with disadvantage, to pick it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What am I rolling?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's proficiency bonus, which is two, plus your dex bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Proficiency and dex. But disadvantage. Okay. 21.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You take a few minutes to look around, which gives you two notifications. One, nothing seems to be immediately coming in to search as to what the noises were, and you do hear other distant sounds. Impacts and cackling and stuff. You get the sense that the tunnels deeper in have some activity amongst the gnolls that live below whatever they've converted this mine network to be. You also see that all the bodies in this chamber have been pretty much picked of any identifiable facets.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeenogru?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, Yeenoghu.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeenoghu?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You gather this is probably the symbol that represents this entity.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The cult of Yeenogru.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeenogru or Yeenoghu?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeenoghu or what?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeenoghu.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Magoo. Well, you know. Fake confidence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you clear now?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How many fingers am I holding up?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: More than I think I have on my entire body. I think I just have four on each hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And thumbs? Or--? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You good? Do we need to get out of here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I'm good. We're fine. I mean, is this the plan? We were supposed to free living people, but we got some arms. We could bring those back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think, I mean, yeah, we could, but--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He did say to bring back anything we could find.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are there any identifiable body parts?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's about an hour or so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We have the silver thread up top, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did we do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Did we? No, we opted not to do that for time's sake.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We could do it now. As we move forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it took a few minutes, didn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we could do that now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How are you feeling, Fjord?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, Fjord, are we going to be Fjord Explorers or Fjord Escapes?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I could do that quickly. I could put an Alarm here quickly. I could do it the fast way, and know if anything is coming behind us. Is that what we want to do? Do we want to go around? I don't know, I'm a little terrified of what is down there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: While he does that, can we, no we can't take a short rest. It's not enough time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's up to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a half hour is a short rest. Or an hour is a short rest.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So if you're in that area over the next few days, you should go say hi and give him some Critter love or on the internet as well. So, yeah, excited to have him next week. In the interim, guys, have a wonderful week, we love you, thank you for joining us, and is it Thursday yet? Good night.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yay!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's a long-time friend of a lot of us here, we've worked a lot in the VO community. If you aren't familiar with him, you should look him up. If you've been watching The Walking Dead or Fear of the Walking Dead, he's been awesome. On that show for a long time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Teen Titan's Go!, plays Grimlock on Transformers, all over the place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Phenomenal voice actor, great actor. We've been talking for a long time, he's been wanting to play in this for a long time, but he's been very busy, of course, those things, but he's in town and he'll be joining us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He's so nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He's such a teddy bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's fucking awesome. So we'll have Khary here next week. We're so excited to have him join us, and go give him a little love. He's actually at a Kansas City convention right now with Will Friedle.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, nice!
